testcase.name: test_reject_no_extension
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_security.py:150: in test_reject_no_extension assert r.status_code == 415 E assert 429 == 415 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reject_exe
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_security.py:154: in test_reject_exe assert r.status_code == 415 E assert 429 == 415 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reject_txt
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_security.py:158: in test_reject_txt assert r.status_code == 415 E assert 429 == 415 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reject_pdf_magic_mismatch
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_security.py:162: in test_reject_pdf_magic_mismatch assert r.status_code == 415 E assert 429 == 415 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_accept_valid_pdf
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_security.py:167: in test_accept_valid_pdf assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 10 per 1 hour"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_download_has_attachment_and_nosniff
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_security.py:174: in test_download_has_attachment_and_nosniff assert up.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auth_login_ratelimit
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_security.py:236: in test_auth_login_ratelimit assert 429 in codes, f"No 429 in {codes}" E AssertionError: No 429 in [401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401] E assert 429 in [401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, ...]

testcase.name: test_candidate_register_ratelimit
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_security.py:245: in test_candidate_register_ratelimit assert 429 in codes, f"No 429 in {codes}" E AssertionError: No 429 in [200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200] E assert 429 in [200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200, ...]
